name: Sweet Potato Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chilled unsalted butter (1 stick), cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Butter a 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Pierce the sweet potatoes in several places.
4. Microwave on high until tender, turning once, about 12 minutes.
5. Cut open and cool the sweet potatoes.
6. Mash enough potatoes to yield 1 cup packed (reserve remaining potatoes for another use).
7. Place the mashed potatoes in a large bowl.
8. Whisk in eggs and buttermilk.
9. Blend cornmeal and the next six ingredients in a processor.
10. Add butter and blend until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
11. Add to egg mixture. Stir just until blended.
12. Transfer to prepared pan.
13. Bake corn bread until deep golden on top and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes.
14. Cool in pan on rack. (Can be made ahead. Cover and let stand at room temperature up to 2 days or freeze up to 2 weeks. Thaw at room temperature.)
